name: io.github.Vishisht16/humane-proxy
description: AI safety middleware that protects humans. Classifies messages for self-harm ideation and criminal intent using a 3-stage cascade pipeline (heuristics → embeddings → reasoning LLM). Returns care responses for self-harm, flags criminal intent, and tracks per-session risk trajectories.

tools.name: check_message_safety
tools.description: Classify a user message for self-harm ideation or criminal intent through a 3-stage safety pipeline.

session_id.description: Optional session identifier for per-user risk trajectory tracking.

tools.name: get_session_risk
tools.description: Return the current risk trajectory for a session, including spike detection, trend analysis, and category distribution.

tools.name: list_recent_escalations
tools.description: Return recent safety escalation events from the audit log, optionally filtered by category.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

category.description: Filter by category: 'self_harm' or 'criminal_intent'. Omit for all.
